name: RPlog_Three_s_a_Crowd
title: Sweeping the New Apartment
summary: Newly released from the orbit of New Republic Intelligence, the ambassador Ambrosia Ad-Delgard moves into a cramped high-rise apartment in the Caamasi Gardens of New Alderaan with her sullen younger daughter Gabi and the recently cleared ex-Imperial officer Liora, also called Kovani. Hungover and wary, Ambrosia sweeps the new home for surveillance devices and, to her grim amusement, turns up a tiny camera bug hidden inside the caf machine. As she works, the women circle the tensions between them: Gabi's recent fistfight with a senator's son, Liora's lingering resentment over having had a Jedi probe her mind during her clearance, and the painful business of building trust after lives spent on opposite sides. Ambrosia tries to reassure Liora that the worst is over and offers a family trip to her mother's beach house on Corellia, but Liora retreats into prickly teenage passive-aggression and leaves for some air, while Ambrosia, defeated but earnest, asks only for a little patience.
